text: POL-index is a comprehensive Polish citation database currently under development at the Interdisciplinary Centre for Mathematical and Computational Modelling (ICM), University of Warsaw. The project emerged from a 2012 evaluation of humanities and social sciences journals conducted by the Polish Ministry of Science and Higher Education. Designed with a flexible architecture for data collection, the system is transitioning toward a workflow that integrates directly with existing Polish bibliographic databases. This collaborative approach is intended to streamline the submission process and reduce the administrative burden on journal editorial boards. A key output of this framework is the Polish Impact Coefficient, which will be formally integrated into the national scholarly journal evaluation process starting in 2014.
